clubIdentity.label: Who we are
clubIdentity.title: Football
clubIdentity.body1: SC Metropolis 25 Berlin e.V. is not a startup — we are a community that has grown since 2019 on Berlin's public pitches. 133+ people from over 11 nations.
clubIdentity.body2: Now, as a registered non-profit club, we are preparing for entry into the Berlin league system — with a squad that reflects Berlin's diversity.

whyJoin.label: Why Metropolis 25?
whyJoin.title: Football with
whyJoin.subtitle: We are not just a club — we are a movement. Berlin football. Real community.
whyJoin.reason1Body: Registered, non-profit, with a future. Not a hobby team — a serious sports club preparing for Berlin leagues.
whyJoin.reason2Body: 11+ nationalities, one team. Character matters here, not your passport.
whyJoin.reason3Body: Structured training. Team spirit. Sporting development for every player.

mission.label: Mission
mission.title: Why we
mission.body1: SC Metropolis 25 Berlin e.V. was founded on 26 November 2025 — born from the conviction that Berlin needs a club that combines football with social responsibility.
mission.body2: We are a registered non-profit association (§60a AO) building our men's team for BFV competition starting season 2026/27.

vision.title: Vision 2030
vision.body: A recognised Berlin football club — with multiple teams, secured venues and a community that moves the city.
vision.goal2: 2nd Men's team & women's football in development

meta.title: Our Story — SC Metropolis 25 Berlin
meta.description: How SC Metropolis 25 Berlin e.V. grew from a group of students on a public pitch.

hero.label: Since 2019
hero.title: Our Story
hero.subtitle: How seven friends on a Berlin public pitch became a registered club — and why we exist.

chapter1.label: Chapter 1 — The Beginning
chapter1.title: Saturdays. Football. Community.
chapter1.p1: It started without a plan, without a club register, without kits. In 2019, seven students met on a Berlin public pitch — with a ball and the simple wish to play. What nobody knew: these Saturdays would become something much bigger.
chapter1.p2: Week after week, more people came. Not through ads or social media — but through word of mouth, through the feeling on that pitch. One brought his brother. Another brought his classmate. Soon there were 15, 20, 30. People from Cameroon, Lebanon, Germany, France, Tunisia, Algeria, Morocco, Syria, the US. All united by the one language that needs no translation.
chapter1.p3: Berlin's public pitches are honest places. Here, it doesn't matter where you're from or what you study. What matters is how you play — and how you treat your teammates. This ethos shaped us from the very beginning.

chapter2.label: Chapter 2 — Growth
chapter2.title: 133 people. One feeling.
chapter2.p1: Between 2019 and 2024 our community grew to over 133 people. We competed in Berlin integration tournaments, represented Berlin at Symposium Mboa — one of Berlin's most important African cultural festivals.
chapter2.p2: 2024 was the year that changed everything: we reached the final at Symposium Mboa. Silver. But more than a medal, it was proof: that we can compete. That we stand together. That we are ready for the next step.
chapter2.p3: The next step was: a registered club. Structured. Professional. Sustainable. No longer just a group of friends — but an institution.

chapter3.label: Chapter 3 — The Club
chapter3.title: 26 November 2025.
chapter3.p1: 22 members gathered for the founding assembly. A board was elected. Statutes were adopted. SC Metropolis 25 Berlin e.V. was officially born.
chapter3.p2: Four weeks later, on 22 December 2025, the District Court Berlin-Charlottenburg entered us in the register of associations. The legal foundation was in place. And on 30 April 2026 the tax office recognised our non-profit status under §60a AO — a milestone that makes donations tax-deductible and underlines public trust.
chapter3.p3: Today we are preparing for BFV competition from season 2026/27. With 23 active field players, a licensed coach and the foundation of six years of lived community.

manifesto.opening: We are not a startup. We are not a project.
manifesto.body: We are a community that grew on Berlin's public pitches — from the simple wish to play together. Now we carry this community into official football. With respect for every player. With responsibility to the city. With the goal of shaping Berlin football.

founding.label: The Founding
founding.date1Detail: 22 founding members. Board elected. Statutes adopted.
founding.date3Detail: Recognised by tax authority. Donations tax-deductible.

timeline.title: The Journey
timeline.y20192024: Growth to 133+ members. Berlin integration tournaments. Symposium Mboa.
timeline.y2024: Symposium Mboa final. Silver. Berlin has a new team.
timeline.y2025: Club founded. 22 members. SC Metropolis 25 Berlin e.V. is born.
